name: ashlr
description: Open-source Claude Code plugin — 20 MCP tools (Read/Grep/Edit/MultiEdit/Ask/SQL/Bash/Tree/HTTP/Diff/Logs/Orient/PR+Issue/Glob/WebFetch/DiffSemantic/Ls), per-session token accounting, animated status line, cinematic Remotion hero video, team invite flow, Grafana dashboard, `ashlr stats --json` CLI, shareable SVG savings badge. MIT, zero telemetry.
